name: lantern
description: Lantern - mensageria com dados canônicos no Relay
author: Gabriel

scripts.dev: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:relay && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron" "npm:dev:relay" "npm:dev:app"
scripts.dev:dual: npm run build:electron && npm run build:relay && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron" "npm:dev:relay" "npm:dev:app:instance-a" "npm:dev:app:instance-b"
scripts.dev:triple: npm run build:electron && npm run build:relay && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron" "npm:dev:relay" "npm:dev:app:instance-a" "npm:dev:app:instance-b" "npm:dev:app:instance-c"
scripts.dev:relay: wait-on file:dist-relay/main.js && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-relay/main.js
scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.dev:app:instance-a: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && cross-env LANTERN_INSTANCE=A LANTERN_DEBUG_DISCOVERY=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.dev:app:instance-b: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && cross-env LANTERN_INSTANCE=B LANTERN_DEBUG_DISCOVERY=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.dev:app:instance-c: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && cross-env LANTERN_INSTANCE=C LANTERN_DEBUG_DISCOVERY=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:dist
scripts.relay-ui:dev: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay-ui && electron dist-relay-ui/relay-ui/main.js
scripts.relay-ui:build:mac: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay-ui && npm run prepare:mac:universal:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.relay-ui.json --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.relay-ui:build:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay-ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.relay-ui.json --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.relay-ui:build:linux: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay-ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.relay-ui.json --linux --x64 --publish never
scripts.migration-ui:dev: npm run build:relay && npm run build:migration-ui && electron dist-migration-ui/migration-ui/main.js
scripts.migration-ui:build:mac: npm run build:relay && npm run build:migration-ui && npm run prepare:mac:universal:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.migration-ui.json --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.migration-ui:build:win: npm run build:relay && npm run build:migration-ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.migration-ui.json --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.migration-ui:build:linux: npm run build:relay && npm run build:migration-ui && electron-builder --config electron-builder.migration-ui.json --linux --x64 --publish never
scripts.relay:start: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-relay/main.js
scripts.migrate:local-backups: npm run build:relay && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-relay/migrateLocalBackups.js
scripts.relay:dist: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-bin.cjs
scripts.relay:dist:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-bin.cjs win
scripts.relay:dist:mac:universal: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-universal-mac.cjs
scripts.relay:dist:mac:x64: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-bin.cjs mac-x64
scripts.relay:dist:mac:arm64: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-bin.cjs mac-arm64
scripts.relay:dist:linux: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:relay && node ./scripts/build-relay-bin.cjs linux
scripts.build:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:dist:win
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:mac:universal:native && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.build:mac:arm64: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:mac:x64: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:dist:linux
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.relay.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.relay-ui.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.migration-ui.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build:relay && npm run build:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/*.test.cjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:relay-ui && npm run build:migration-ui
